event.name: Fiji Surf Pro
event.cover_sub: My top 4 to make the final at Cloudbreak - one of the best lefthanders on the planet. Down-the-line wave riding, big scores, no room for error.

picks.name: Camille Juban
picks.why: The 2022 IWT Fiji event winner, with countless {{port-tack down-the-line}} wins under his belt.

picks.name: Sugi
picks.why: A {{surprise finalist}} here in 2023 - and we reckon he can do it again.

picks.name: Baptiste Cloarec
picks.why: Winner here in 2023 and {{simply unstoppable}} when Cloudbreak turns on.

picks.label: Pick to Win
picks.name: Robby Swift
picks.why: Third in 2023, and skipping the full 2026 tour - sounds like a {{man on a mission}}.
